steps.title: Map the bat pattern
steps.content: The text first describes the fruit-bat finding and explains it through reward and risk. It then says most nocturnal mammals follow that pattern before introducing mongoose lemurs as an exception explained by visual foraging.

steps.title: Reject mismatched structures
steps.content: Choice A is wrong because both responses are explained. Choice C invents other studies and a methods difference. Choice D says the exception casts doubt on the explanation, but the text uses the same reward-risk logic to account for it. The answer is B.
